item.title: Configurable auto-fix command (fix_cmd)
item.intent: Lint-fixable issues must be auto-resolved before validation.
steps: Run fix_cmd after developer agent completes
Warn on failure but do not abort sprint
On retry, run fix_cmd before developer re-attempts
Tell developer agent prompt that fix_cmd will auto-run
acceptanceCriteria: fix_cmd failure warns but does not abort
On retry, fix_cmd runs before re-attempt
